text: What if life beyond Earth poses risks we can't predict? Xenobiology explores alien life forms, but it's not just about discovery. We don’t fully understand how these organisms might interact with Earth. Past missions have shown that even harmless microbes can cause chaos. Caution in xenobiology isn’t fear; it’s essential for our safety in a vast unknown. Curious about more science insights? Like and follow for more!
